message:
feat(session): implement session-level event hooks (bd-27bm)

Add session event callback system with before/after hooks for flush,
commit, and rollback operations:

- SessionEventCallbacks struct with typed callback storage
- SessionEvent enum (BeforeFlush, AfterFlush, BeforeCommit, AfterCommit, AfterRollback)
- Registration methods: on_before_flush, on_after_flush, on_before_commit,
  on_after_commit, on_after_rollback
- Event callbacks can abort operations by returning Err
- Events fire at correct points in flush/commit/rollback lifecycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
